name: Bun
description: Extremely fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager all-in-one. Drop-in Node.js replacement with 3x+ speed improvements.

name: Cloudflare
description: All-in-one network dashboard. Manage DNS, CDN, DDoS protection, SSL certificates, and edge Workers for your domains.

name: CodeSandbox
description: Instant online development environment for web apps. Fork templates, collaborate in real-time, and deploy instantly.

name: Coolify
description: Open-source, self-hostable Heroku/Netlify alternative. Deploy apps, databases, and services on your own VPS with a beautiful UI. Full Docker support.

name: Discord Devs
description: Create and manage Discord bots and OAuth2 apps. Configure bot permissions, slash commands, webhooks, and view API documentation.

name: DNS Checker
description: Verify DNS propagation from 100+ locations worldwide. Check if your A, CNAME, MX, or TXT records have updated globally.

name: Docker Hub
description: The world's largest container image registry. Pull official images, push your own, and manage private repositories.

name: Firebase
description: Google's backend-as-a-service platform. Realtime database, auth, cloud functions, hosting, and analytics — all in one SDK.

name: GitHub
description: The world's largest code hosting platform. Version control with Git, open-source collaboration, CI/CD with Actions, and project management.

name: GitLab
description: Git-based code hosting with a built-in CI/CD pipeline, issue tracker, container registry, and DevSecOps toolchain.

name: Hono
description: Ultra-fast web framework for the edge. Runs on Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, and Node. Tiny footprint with Express-like API.

name: HTML Color Codes
description: Color picker with hex codes, RGB values, HSL, and CSS gradients. Includes a palette builder and named colour reference.

name: JSFiddle
description: Online editor to write, test, and share HTML, CSS, and JavaScript snippets in the browser. Great for quick prototypes and bug reports.

name: Kubernetes
description: Open-source container orchestration platform. Automate the deployment, scaling, and management of containerised applications.

name: Linear
description: Fast, streamlined issue tracker for software teams. Loved by engineers for its keyboard-first design, speed, and deep GitHub/GitLab integration.

name: Lucide Icons
description: Beautiful, consistent open-source icon set with 1,300+ icons. Available as SVG, React components, or via CDN.

name: MongoDB Atlas
description: Fully managed cloud MongoDB hosting. Deploy on AWS, Azure, or GCP with built-in search, charts, and a free 512MB cluster.

name: Netlify
description: Static site and serverless hosting with CI/CD, form handling, edge functions, and branch deploy previews built in.

name: ngrok
description: Instantly expose localhost to the internet. Create secure tunnels for webhooks, API testing, demos, and remote access without firewall changes.

name: PlanetScale
description: Serverless MySQL database platform with branching. Deploy schema changes like code branches — no downtime, no locks. Built on Vitess.

name: Postman
description: API development platform for building, testing, mocking, and documenting REST, GraphQL, and SOAP APIs.

name: Replit
description: Browser-based IDE for coding, running, and hosting projects without any local setup. Supports 50+ programming languages.

name: Sentry
description: Application monitoring and error tracking. Catch crashes, performance issues, and regressions in real-time across web, mobile, and backend services.

name: Stack Overflow
description: The go-to Q&A site for developers. Search millions of answered questions or post your own to the global dev community.

name: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative. Postgres database, realtime subscriptions, auth, storage, and edge functions.

name: Tauri
description: Build tiny, blazing-fast desktop apps with web technologies. Uses Rust backend instead of Electron's Chromium — produces apps 10x smaller.

name: TinyURL
description: Instantly shorten long URLs into compact, shareable links. Supports custom aliases and basic click tracking.

name: Turso
description: Edge SQLite database powered by libSQL. Deploy databases close to your users globally with sub-millisecond reads. Generous free tier.

name: Vercel
description: Zero-config deployment platform for frontend frameworks. Push to Git and your app is live in seconds with global CDN.

name: Vercel Analytics
description: Real user monitoring and web analytics built into Vercel. Track Core Web Vitals, page performance, and visitor data with zero config.

name: Vite
description: Next-generation frontend build tool. Blazing-fast HMR, instant server start, and optimized production builds using native ES modules.

name: Warp
description: Modern AI-powered terminal built in Rust. Features command autocomplete, AI command search, shared runbooks, and a block-based output model.

name: Postman
description: The standard tool for building, testing, and documenting APIs. Collections, environments, and automated test runs.

name: DBeaver
description: Free universal database GUI supporting MySQL, Postgres, SQLite, and dozens more. Browse, query, and edit data visually.

name: DevDocs
description: Fast, searchable, offline-capable documentation for hundreds of APIs and languages combined into one interface.

name: Can I Use
description: Browser compatibility tables for HTML5, CSS3, and JS features. Check support before you ship a new feature.

name: GitLab
description: Complete DevOps platform with Git hosting, CI/CD, and issue tracking built in. Strong self-hosting option too.

name: StackBlitz
description: Full dev environments that boot instantly in the browser. No install needed for React, Vue, Node, and more.

name: CodeSandbox
description: Instant web-based dev environments for prototyping and sharing code. Great for bug reports and quick demos.

name: Replit
description: Collaborative browser-based coding for 50+ languages. Build, run, and deploy apps without setting up anything locally.

name: Insomnia
description: Open-source API client similar to Postman. Test REST, GraphQL, and gRPC endpoints with a clean desktop app.

name: Lighthouse
description: Google's automated tool for measuring web page quality — performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices.
